author: Ethan
name: LongContext 4096 + Full SOTA Stack
blurb: Complete PR #549 SOTA stack (11L, LeakyReLU²+square, SmearGate, BigramHash, XSA-4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, VE128, EMA+SWA, GPTQ-lite, Parallel Muon, OrthoInit, Legal TTT) with train_seq_len raised from 2048 to 4096. Dynamic NTK scales rope_base to ~48550 automatically. Each training token sees up to 4095 tokens of causal context vs 2047 in the SOTA. Two-line diff from PR #549.
